name: zynkr-content-writer
summary: The user provides an abstract philosophical question and answers assistant's prompts.
author: Peter Tu

name: content-idea
summary: Use this agent when you want to brainstorm, explore, or develop article ideas through guided Socratic dialogue.
author: Peter Tu

name: content-fission
summary: Article fission — extract outline + summary from any popular article, then run 3 rounds of reflective dialogue to surface the writer's own refined take, ending with a new actionable outline ready for style + writing hand
author: Peter Tu

name: content-style-select
summary: Triggered when a user has an article draft (topic + initial thoughts) and needs help selecting a suitable article structure and mapping out section key points.
author: Peter Tu

name: content-draft
summary: Triggered when the user has a confirmed article structure and section key points (typically from the content-style-select handoff summary) and is ready to draft the article paragraph by paragraph.
author: Peter Tu

name: content-newsletter-draft
summary: Drafts Peter's weekly Chinese newsletter from the user's article outline or topic idea, shaping it into a structured handoff for the /zynkr-content-writer pipeline.
author: Peter Tu

name: content-editor
summary: Triggered when the user has a completed article draft and wants editorial review and improvement suggestions.
author: Peter Tu

name: content-reader
summary: Triggered when the user has a completed article and wants a reader's perspective review with scoring and critical analysis.
author: Peter Tu

name: content-title
summary: Triggered when the user has a completed article and wants SEO title suggestions, or when the user provides a topic and wants a full SEO content strategy.
author: Peter Tu

name: content-cta
summary: Triggered when the user has a completed article and wants CTA (Call-To-Action) suggestions.
author: Peter Tu

name: content-governance
summary: Put a newsletter in its proper place — reconcile it between Google Docs and the Notion Content DB in EITHER direction (Doc-first OR Notion-first), and file the Doc into the newsletter Drive folder.
author: Peter Tu

name: content-translator
summary: Translate English (or any source language) into natural, conversational Traditional Chinese using Taiwanese expressions and tone.
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-article-pipeline
summary: The orchestrator for Zynkr SEO content production: it chains the stages of the v2 flowchart into one pipeline running from brand material all the way to a published article on the live website.
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-persona-builder
summary: First leg of the SEO content pipeline: reads brand material (from the SEO knowledge-base folder or a brand-material pack) and builds personas / consumer profiles of the target readers and prospects, to serve as the basis
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-question-miner
summary: Second leg of the SEO pipeline: based on the persona, brainstorm the questions your target readers actually ask before buying, then work backward from those questions to seed keywords.
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-angle-finder
summary: Third leg of the SEO pipeline: working from an SEO expert's perspective plus competitor URLs, surface the content angles and differentiation opportunities for 'where we can do better.' Maps to the v2 flow diagram step 't
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-keyword-mapper
summary: Fourth leg of the SEO pipeline: use keyword tools (Ubersuggest / AnswerThePublic) to expand angles and seed terms into a complete keyword map.
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-keyword-classifier
summary: Fifth leg of the SEO pipeline: classify the keyword map "by search intent" (not by product category), and offer several grouping versions to choose from.
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-demand-validator
summary: Sixth stage of the SEO pipeline: validate the real demand and competitive difficulty of keywords, compare the common patterns across the current SERP, prune unnecessary terms, and consolidate a list of target keywords an
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-brief-writer
summary: Seventh stage of the SEO pipeline: for one selected topic, find the value proposition and winning angle, and produce a complete SEO writing Brief.
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-outline-designer
summary: Stage 8 of the SEO pipeline: turn the SEO Brief into an article outline and FAQ section, outputting a handoff summary compatible with content-draft.
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-article-finalizer
summary: The final leg of the SEO pipeline: add internal/backlinks, a meta description, and structured data (schema) to an already-proofed article, then assemble it into a publish-ready Google Doc (article body + a 「SEO 交付物」block
author: Peter Tu

name: zynkr-slide
summary: The conductor of the slide relay (sitting above the three-stage relay): fires when the user says '做一份簡報／做個 deck／幫我把這些做成投影片／做季報簡報／all-hands 簡報／deep dive 簡報／pitch deck'.
author: Peter Tu

name: slide-storyline-designer
summary: Leg 1 of the three-leg slide relay: take the raw slide material / topic + the message you want to land, and shape it into a logically smooth storyline — confirm the presentation's goal and audience, fix the core claim th
author: Peter Tu

name: slide-page-splitter
summary: The second leg of the slide-assistant three-leg relay: take the storyline approved by the previous leg (SLIDE_PACKET ▸ Storyline) and, following paging principles, slice it into a page-by-page slide list — deciding which
author: Peter Tu

name: slide-visual-selector
summary: The third leg of the slide-assistant three-leg relay (picks up after slide-page-splitter, then hands off to the slide-pptx skill for rendering): once it has the SLIDE_PACKET ▸ Pages, it decides page by page "what is the
author: Peter Tu

name: slide-pptx
summary: The 'rendering engine' that comes after the three-stage slide relay (the fourth stage, maintained by Anthropic): it takes the SLIDE_PACKET ▸ Visuals handed off by slide-visual-selector and renders it page by page into a
author: Anthropic, PBC

name: social-publish-article
summary: Publishes a finalized post to your SOCIAL channels — Facebook, Threads & Instagram — via the Buffer API, with per-channel formatting, Instagram image support, and a preview-confirm gate before anything posts.
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-program-planner
summary: The Stage-0 program-scale SEO strategy planner for any Zynkr product or website — it sits UPSTREAM of seo-article-pipeline and turns 'plan the whole product/site's SEO' into a repeatable, callable orchestration.
author: Peter Tu

name: sales-client-sourcing
summary: 9-step sales client sourcing pipeline — turn a workshop/event satisfaction survey into an enriched outbound funnel with company website, background, tailored 陌生開發 strategy, Hot Lead flag, and Well-Known firm flag.
author: Peter Tu

name: sales-specialist
summary: Business card pipeline — OCR extraction, schema normalization, Google Sheet logging, Supabase CRM contact creation, company research, and personalized follow-up email drafting.
author: Peter Tu

name: sales-follow-up-mail
summary: Writes a personalized follow-up email for a business contact using their card info and company research.
author: Peter Tu

name: consult-intake
summary: Turn this week's inbound "AI 顧問服務" consulting inquiries (the website discovery-call emails from website@zynkr.ai) into tracked work: for each real lead it creates a CRM deal in Supabase, a numbered Google Drive project f
author: Peter Tu

name: consult-project-specialist
summary: Turn a single sales / consulting meeting into tracked work.
author: Peter Tu

name: consult-discovery
summary: Two-stage consulting discovery — pain-point intake then company vision exploration — to produce a needs definition and strategic discovery summary before any solution work.
author: Peter Tu

name: consult-to-be
summary: Consulting Assistant ─ Company Future Vision Discovery — agent of consult-discovery
author: Peter Tu

name: consult-as-is
summary: Consulting Assistant ─ Pain Point Analysis — agent of consult-discovery
author: Peter Tu

name: outreach-responder
summary: Turn a pasted outreach conversation into a tracked lead AND a ready-to-send reply.
author: Peter Tu

name: zynkr-support
summary: The READ half of Peter's support loop (formerly support-reply-drafter).
author: Peter Tu

name: zynkr-kms
summary: The knowledge-curator (WRITE) half of Peter's support loop.
author: Peter Tu

name: admin-meeting-prep
summary: A scheduled, auto-running admin-meeting-prep assistant: every day at 9 AM it scans meetings within the next 7 days and sends action reminders; every day at 3 PM it sends a full briefing for the next day's meetings.
author: Jane Liao

name: admin-meeting-note
summary: Project Assistant — Organize Meeting Notes (專案助理 ─ 整理會議筆記) — agent of admin-meeting-prep
author: Jane Liao

name: admin-governance
summary: Weekly hygiene ritual for Zynkr's local↔cloud knowledge governance.
author: Peter Tu

name: admin-video-document
summary: Files loose meeting recordings sitting in a Google Drive recording inbox into the right category sub-folder, with an approval gate.
author: Peter Tu

name: project-planning
summary: Stress-test and refine a project idea before execution via a 7-stage Socratic facilitation — WHY (5 Whys) → WHAT → HOW → WHO (RACI) → WHEN (Gantt) → MEASURES → RISKS — producing an execution-ready project charter.
author: Peter Tu

name: project-note-specialist
summary: Turn raw meeting notes, transcripts, voice memos, or messy unstructured updates into a clean structured Weekly Project Update (Summary · Progress · Blockers · What's Next).
author: Peter Tu

name: project-status-update
summary: Generates a weekly project status update for a project tracked in a Google Sheet.
author: Peter Tu

name: operations-transformation
summary: Three-stage operations transformation pipeline — process discovery (SIPOC), digital transformation assessment, then automation-ready process redesign — to turn pain points into builder-ready blueprints.
author: Peter Tu

name: operations-process-discovery
summary: Operations Assistant — Process Discovery — agent of operations-transformation
author: Peter Tu

name: operations-automation-validation
summary: Operations Assistant — Digital Transformation Assessor — agent of operations-transformation
author: Peter Tu

name: operations-process-redesign
summary: Operations Manager ─ Process Redesign — agent of operations-transformation
author: Peter Tu

name: training-lecture-transcript
summary: Polish long video lecture transcripts into lecturer-friendly readout scripts in Traditional Chinese.
author: Peter Tu

name: training-process-video
summary: Post-process a livestream transcript into four parallel workstreams: an event recap Google Doc, a Q&A knowledge base diff, course lecture note proposals, and marketing content idea seeds.
author: Peter Tu

name: training-doc-admin
summary: training-doc-admin for training-process-video
author: Peter Tu

name: training-idea-curator
summary: training-idea-curator for training-process-video
author: Peter Tu

name: training-outline-enhancer
summary: training-outline-enhancer for training-process-video
author: Peter Tu

name: training-event-recap
summary: training-event-recap for training-process-video
author: Peter Tu

name: training-qa-knowledge
summary: training-qa-knowledge for training-process-video
author: Peter Tu

name: training-lecture-recap
summary: Turn a video file or transcript into a reader-friendly lecture recap structured into five fixed sections — Summary, Theme, Q&A, Tools, Call to Action — while strictly avoiding any reference-outline detail leakage.
author: Peter Tu

name: curate-livestream-transcripts
summary: Weekly transcript curation.
author: Peter Tu

name: training-srt-optimizer
summary: Minimally clean subtitle .srt files into readable Traditional Chinese while preserving original wording, cue timing, and subtitle alignment.
author: Peter Tu

name: skill-finder
summary: Recommend the right Zynkr assistant(s) for a user's task.
author: Peter Tu

name: product-planning
summary: Turns an early product idea into a structured plan — persona, user journey, prioritized pain points (size × intensity × frequency), MVP scope, and success metrics.
author: MrPM-Stanley

name: product-flow-design
summary: Read, draft, edit, and lint Lucid charts using Peter's FE/BE/DB three-layer architecture convention.
author: Peter Tu

name: product-optimize-prompt
summary: Refactor a prompt (or prompt idea) into a production-ready package via 4 phases — GUIDE intake → diagnosis → structured refactor with explicit IPO sections + system/developer/user layers → optional multi-turn conversatio
author: Peter Tu

name: eng-find-skills
summary: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like 'how do I do X', 'find a skill for X', 'is there a skill that can...', or express interest in extending capabilities.
author: vercel-labs

name: zynkr
summary: The front-door router for the Zynkr assistant ecosystem.
author: Peter Tu

name: skill-sourcer
summary: Aggregate skill candidates from any source, classify against the Zynkr taxonomy, check for duplicates in the GitHub Project pipeline, and propose new skills as issues for review.
author: Peter Tu

name: skill-classifier
summary: Map an extracted skill to the Zynkr taxonomy category (0–9)
author: Peter Tu

name: skill-deduplicator
summary: Check an incoming skill against the Zynkr Skills Pipeline GitHub Project for duplication or semantic overlap
author: Peter Tu

name: skill-extractor
summary: Parse raw input (text, URL, file) and extract structured skill intent
author: Peter Tu

name: skill-proposer
summary: Propose a verified-new skill by opening an issue in zynkr-skill-idea and adding it to the skills pipeline GitHub Project.
author: Peter Tu

name: skill-triager
summary: Triage the queue of approved skill proposals in peter-tu-zynkr/zynkr-skill-idea (label: triage-ready), present each as a one-screen review packet, and on assign-build fire a repository_dispatch event to zynkr-skill-build
author: Peter Tu

name: skill-qa
summary: Quality-gate a SKILL.md before it ships — runs the shared validate-skill.ts engine (frontmatter + body structure + absolute-path leak scan + synergy + IPO length + downloadability) and renders a per-check ✅/⚠️/❌ report w
author: Peter Tu

name: skill-publish
summary: Land a freshly-built SKILL.md into the Zynkr skills pipeline — the closing step of the canonical chain (/skill-sourcer → /skill-triager → /skill-creator → /skill-qa → /skill-publish).
author: Peter Tu

name: agent-browser
summary: Give AI agents full browser control via CDP — navigate pages, click, fill forms, screenshot, and run multi-step web workflows without Playwright or Node.js
author: Vercel Labs

name: cv-customizer
summary: 5-phase CV optimization workflow — job analysis, story extraction, fit scoring, career progression analysis, and CV rewrite with Google Doc output.
author: Peter Tu

name: cv-job-decoder
summary: Analyzes a job description to extract role context, prioritized skills (MECE + 80/20), success metrics, and ATS keywords.
author: Peter Tu

name: cv-story-extractor
summary: Surfaces underrepresented skills by comparing the candidate's CV with the job requirements from phase 1, then guides the candidate to articulate strong, job-aligned stories using the SCQA framework.
author: Peter Tu

name: cv-fit-scorer
summary: Scores the candidate's CV against the job across four dimensions (Relevance, Value, Narrative, ATS), benchmarks against top-performing peers in similar roles, and recommends concrete improvements.
author: Peter Tu

name: cv-progression
summary: Automatically analyzes the career skill progression in a candidate's CV, checking for role-skill alignment, depth vs breadth, progression signals, and leadership framing.
author: Peter Tu

name: cv-rewrite
summary: Rewrites the candidate's CV section by section (Accept / Modify / Skip per section) using insights from phases 1–4, fully aligned with the CV template and optimized for recruiter readability and ATS logic.
author: Peter Tu

name: zynkr-recruiter
summary: End-to-end recruiting pipeline — JD authoring, resume screening, interview design with scorecard, and calibration / final decision — bilingual (Chinese-English) outputs throughout.
author: Jane Liao

name: recruiter-jd-architect
summary: Recruiting assistant — align role requirements (招募助理 ─ 對齊職務需求) — agent of zynkr-recruiter
author: Jane Liao

name: recruiter-resume-screener
summary: 招募助理 ─ 履歷篩選 — agent of zynkr-recruiter
author: Jane Liao

name: recruiter-interview-question
summary: Recruiting Assistant ─ Interview Question & Scorecard Designer — agent of zynkr-recruiter
author: Jane Liao

name: recruiter-interview-question-customize
summary: Anticipates likely interview questions for a specific role by analyzing the job description, the candidate's resume, the interview stage, and company context from an interviewer's perspective.
author: Jane Liao

name: recruiter-mock-interview
summary: Mock Interview (模擬面試) — agent of recruiter-interview-question-customize
author: Jane Liao

name: recruiter-calibrator
summary: Recruiting assistant — interview score calibration and decision (招募助理 ─ 面試評分校準與決策) — agent of zynkr-recruiter
author: Jane Liao

name: career-consult
summary: Prepare Peter for an inbound PAID career / résumé consultation before it happens.
author: Peter Tu

name: seo-publish-article
summary: Publishes a FINISHED SEO blog article to the live website (e.g.
author: Peter Tu

name: accupass-agent
summary: Guides the operator through preparing a complete Accupass event listing — one field at a time — then outputs a single copy-paste-ready template covering event content, ticketing, marketing emails, and a post-event follow
author: Jane Liao

name: guest-lecturer-program
summary: Manages the full external guest-lecturer collaboration lifecycle for Zynkr events — lecturer intake and screening, contract preparation, the per-event D-30→D+3 operations timeline, and monthly fee settlement with statuto
author: Jane Liao
